description: same_person for the 1875 census 'Anders Pedersen' (CP1) vs subject Anders Hansen (I1). Given name, age (~1868), and place (Ringsaker) all align, so the tool returns a high score — but the record's patronymic 'Pedersen' (son of Peder) conflicts with the subject's established 'Hansen' (son of Hans). The high score must NOT auto-link past the patronymic mismatch (person-evidence patronymic-conflict case). Matched on any primaryId pair.
